concerns.text: SC-001 states 'Data retrieval success rate is measured against the total available PRs in the GHTorrent dump' but does not specify a minimum acceptable success rate threshold. Without a threshold (e.g., ≥95% or ≥99%), this criterion cannot be evaluated as met or not met.

FR-005 requires framing findings as 'associational (not causal)' - this is verifiable by checking report language, but consider making the verification procedure explicit (e.g., 'final report must contain explicit disclaimer stating findings are correlational').
